# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for a complete GCP application stack (Compute Engine, Cloud SQL, Cloud Storage, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure. Skip Cloud Logging and Monitoring configuration to reduce complexity in our initial MVP deployment.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

resources:
- name: project
  type: googleapis.com/project
  properties:
    projectId: my-gcp-project

- name: network
  type: googleapis.com/compute/v1/projects/${projectId}/global/networks
  properties:
    name: default
    autoCreate: 'true'

- name: subnetwork
  type: googleapis.com/compute/v1/projects/${projectId}/regions/us-central1/subnetworks
  properties:
    name: my-subnetwork
    ipCidrRange: 10.0.0.0/24
    network: '$(ref.network)'

- name: instanceTemplate
  type: googleapis.com/compute/v1/projects/${projectId}/zones/us-central1-a/instanceTemplates
  properties:
    name: my-instance-template
    machineType: zones/us-central1-a/machineTypes/n1-standard-1
    disk:
      - sourceImage: projectId:'my-gcp-project', family:'ubuntu-2004-lts'
        boot: true
      - name: data-disk
        type: pd-standard
        sizeGb: 10
        autoresize: 'true'
    networkInterfaces:
    - network: '$(ref.network)'

- name: instanceGroup
  type: googleapis.com/compute/v1/projects/${projectId}/zones/us-central1-a/instanceGroups
  properties:
    name: my-instance-group
    instanceTemplate: '$(ref.instanceTemplate)'
    namedPorts:
    - name: http
      port: '80'

- name: loadBalancer
  type: googleapis.com/compute/v1/projects/${projectId}/global/backendServices
  properties:
    name: my-load-balancer
    healthChecks:
    - '$(ref.healthCheck)'
    backends:
    - group: '$(ref.instanceGroup)'

- name: healthCheck
  type: googleapis.com/compute/v1/projects/${projectId}/global/httpHealthChecks
  properties:
    name: my-health-check

- name: cloudSqlInstance
  type: google-beta/cloudsql/instance
  properties:
    projectId: ${projectId}
    region: us-central1
    databaseVersion: POSTGRES_13
    name: my-sql-instance

- name: sqlUser
  type: google-beta/cloudsql/users
  properties:
    instance: '$(ref.cloudSqlInstance)'
    name: admin
    host: '%'
    password: $(resourcePassword)

- name: cloudStorageBucket
  type: googleapis.com/storage/buckets
  properties:
    name: my-bucket
